mnemonics: BOB - Boolean, Oh Boy, operators are Binary Operations
MOD - Most Often Done, in the Order of Operations
?- is Life, the Question Mark operator
keyPoints: Boolean Logical Operators (&&, ||, !) used for logical operations
Assignment Operator (=) used to assign values to variables
Question Mark Operator (?) used to simplify ternary expressions
Operator Precedence: follows the order of operations (PEMDAS/BODMAS)
Using operators effectively is key to writing efficient code
